posts.title: "We must all hang together, or most assuredly we shall all hang separately" Support Guntuber Jordan Dugan Ashley

link_metadata.description: Longtime readers here and early GunTube fans have likely followed Dugan Ashley of CarniK Con (Carnivorous Kinetic Concepts) since he burst onto the scene around 2013.Jordan Derrick, who is an OIF Army veteran, brought something fresh with his high-energy humor and unique access to obscure firearms and full autos, at least in the early days of Guntube.Along with a healthy dose of genuine technical firearms knowledge, Dugan also self-produced gun-themed music tracks, and in my opinion, had an unfiltered American spirit, specifically unique to the state of Missouri.

A football field-sized American flag is being displayed on the Hoover Dam, alongside a light show, to celebrate the United States' 250th birthday.

It will stay on the historic dam, weather permitting, through July 4.

posts.raw_content:
The now infamous Aliens.gov purports 3.12 deportations.  That is largely self deports.  

https://cmsny.org/two-million-deportation-myth-ice-enforcement-distorting-data/

USAFacts.Org:
Repatriations are executed by both ICE and CBP. CBP repatriation data is not available after 11/2024, but ICE repatriated 319,980 in FY 2025; Between October 2025 and January 2026, ICE removed 144,378 individuals; on pace to reach over 430,000 total removals by the end of FY 2026."   You can't divide self deportations and call it a monsterous success.

Going faster isn't a problem.  There is no will.  Because of the national security emergency, The courts have ruled Posse Commitatus is allowable. So why isnt the military activated?  

US COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE NINTH CIRCUIT RULED IN FAVOR OF THE EXECUTIVE BRANCH'S EMERGENCY AUTHORITY—TEMPORARILY ALLOWING THE POSSE COMITATUS SUSPENSION TO STAND—NEWSOM V. TRUMP AND THE RECONVENED STATE OF OREGON V. TRUMP. 

Even if PC wasnt allowed we are failing: There are 22000 ICE agents.  If 2 agents led a ten man team of 2 local Leo and 6 national guard back up (authorized in PC), that would be 11,000 teams.  Or 110,000 officers.  
If each team arrested a conservative 10 people per day (just one person per team member) that would be 110,000 arrests per day.   

220 federal working days per year ( less holidays, weekends, 30 days vacation).  Thats 24,200,000 million ACTUAL deports possible in ICE officers leading teams for a year.

I sent a fleshed out plan based on above, to the WH comms team, office of the Pres, National Security advisor, VP,  State dept and DHS. Going faster isnt a problem. Actually Doing So is.

I didn't include Border Patrol. Or all DHS officers, which totals 80,000.
Now add military, national guard and a bounty program. 

"ooooo. Look at the doomer."  I was 25 yrs USCG. Every person is expected to achieve results. This production is a weak at best.  "Oh but its better than Biden" By that standard the Coast Guard could save 10 people and capture 1pound of drugs. But it doesnt.

posts.author: SuperDuperBasedMD
posts.title: Sundance On why Peter Thiel moved to Argentina
posts.content:
https://x.com/TheLastRefuge2/status/2060558466561769959?s=20

I can explain this, perhaps not eloquently.

First, understand that ideologically all of the tech bros are essentially more aligned with Democrats than any other political construct.

Second, Thiel (Palantir) has openly shared what the future of AI combined with surveillance will look like. His CEO Alex Karp has also outlined (during the Anthropic controversy) how the U.S. govt can simply throw a definition of "national security" over any technology (even public sector) and take control of it.

Third, then overlay the datacenter issue, which will enhance all of the AI stuff and then collate with the surveillance stuff. The tech oligarchs know the system they will build will then become a matter of national defense and as an outcome govt controlled.

Fourth. The technocrats are currently supporting the MAGA division, because essentially having Trump or Trumpian cabinet making decisions is not in the interest of their constructed business model.

Fifth, give yourself an honest, historical, non-pretending review of how Obama/Biden weaponized the functions of government. Including the law enforcement, justice and national security institutions.

Lastly, with totalitarians, ideological Democrats, likely to take control of the systems, the Tech bros need a hedge against: (a) losing their operational interests, and (b) becoming target #1 for the system they have created.

The Hedge Bet: Peter Thiel creates option to move family to Argentina.
